calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lenore Gerard for and with David Rubio (Petitioner). James Cunningham (Paralegal) also present.

Mr. Rubio answered a series of questions presented by the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
